name: Danny Spina
summary:
I'm Danny, a software developer with a special focus on frontend and design ops, based in Parma, Italy.
I've been building web software since 2017 — full-stack product work, frontend architectures and design systems — first as an employee in German companies, now independently.
Before software I spent six years repairing professional camera equipment, a background that still shapes how I write code: documented, maintainable, made to be serviced by whoever comes next.
I work mostly with TypeScript, Vue and Node.

experiences.title: Software Developer & Design Ops
experiences.summary: Independent software developer. Web software end to end — features, architecture, maintenance — with a special focus on frontend, design systems and design ops.

experiences.title: Frontend Engineer & Design Ops
experiences.summary: Rebuilt the frontend architecture of the company services and introduced a new design system, together with new processes and communication tools between developers and designers.

experiences.title: Web Developer

experiences.title: Web Developer
experiences.summary: Full-stack web developer across backend and frontend — PHP, Node/TypeScript, Vue/Svelte, Google Cloud Platform and Docker.

experiences.title: Web Developer
experiences.summary: Three-year apprenticeship (Ausbildung) as software developer. Full-stack experience with PHP, React, JavaScript and Docker.

experiences.title: Nikon Technician
experiences.summary: Technician specialized in professional Nikon camera equipment — precision repair of mechanical and electronic systems.
